visual_description: Several men in business attire and jackets are moving through a busy indoor space with computer monitors and bulletin boards displaying images. One man carries an orange briefcase while others walk past or stand near workstations, some looking at screens or conversing. The scene is crowded with people in motion, and a man in a dark jacket with "OCTB" on the back is partially visible.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and pace, accompanied by a noticeable gasp and a sigh.
